emails.subject: FW: Confidentiality agreement
emails.body: FW: Confidentiality agreement Dan, could you please take a look at this confidentiality agreement that I received back from GWF? The attached version below was changed only to add their name and commodity; otherwise it's identical to the version I sent them (and that I had gotten from you). Please let me know if it's acceptable and I'll get it signed. Thanks! Walter To: Guidroz, Walter

emails.subject: FW: Confidentiality agreement
emails.body: FW: Confidentiality agreement Dan, could you please take a look at this confidentiality agreement that I received back from GWF? emails.subject: Re: FW: Confidentiality agreement
emails.body: Re: FW: Confidentiality agreement Walter, The document is okay if you put it on ENA letterhead, and add the counterparty's name in the blank in the signature area. Please call if you need anything futher. Walter Guidroz/ENRON@enronXgate 04/19/2001 11:43 AM
